stemHtml: A pilot is departing from Lille in F-GTPO approaching the holding point with three aircraft ahead. The pilot receives the following message: "F-PO, contact Lille Tower 118.550"? What course of action must the pilot take?

options.a: Read back: “118.550, F-PO”, switch to 118.550 MHz, and wait for Lille Tower to initiate communications on this frequency.
options.b: Read back: “Contacting 118.550, F-PO”, switch to 118.550 MHz, and wait for Lille Tower to initiate communications on this frequency.
options.c: Read back: “118.550, F-PO”, switch to 118.550 MHz, and call Lille Tower to notify his/her presence on this frequency.
options.d: Read back: “Calling 118.550, F-PO”, switch to 118.550 MHz, and call Lille Tower to notify his/her presence on this frequency.
